source_pr.title: planner: add test for heuristic index selection
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #27229

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1. Add test related to clustered index.
2. Add test about update/delete/insert into ... select/replace into ... select.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: sql: "select * from t where e_str = 'hi' order by c", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t where e_str = 'hi' order by c", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: sql: "select * from t where e_str = 'hi' order by c", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go).
fix_pattern: sql: "select * from t where e_str = 'hi' order by c", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
